name: camera_epic_pullback
description: Scale-revealing pullback. Camera starts near-and-low, pulls back along its current axis and rises so the hero becomes small in frame by the final beat. Ship closes on a wide. Pairs naturally with the `epic_pullback` composition; can also be dropped onto any other composition for a variant ending.

metadata.author: team
metadata.inspiration: Empire Strikes Back Hoth open; Contact closing shot
